title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy (and Never Sell)
text: When it comes to finding the best long-term dividend stocks to buy, yield should one be a key part of your overall criteria. It may sound tempting to build a dividend portfolio made up entirely of high-yielding names, but there are some flaws to such a strategy.

title: Dividend Portfolio Update: April 2023

title: This Dividend King Continues to Deliver on Its Promises
text: Shares of Illinois Tool Works sold off after its Q1 earnings report. The industrial company's operating margin is best-in-breed.

title: ITW Board Of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., May 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Board of Directors of Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) declared a dividend on the company's common stock of $1.31 per share for the second quarter of 2023. The dividend equates to $5.24 per share on a full-year basis. The dividend will be paid on July 13, 2023 to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2023.

title: Illinois Tool (ITW) Beats on Q1 Earnings, Raises FY23 View
text: Illinois Tool's (ITW) first-quarter results benefit from higher revenues across most segments and lower cost of sales. The company improves its 2023 outlook despite a slowdown in certain end markets.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q1 Earnings
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Illinois Tool Works (ITW) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.33 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.18 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.11 per share a year ago.

title: ITW Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
